name: academic-writer
description: Q1-ready scholarly writing, literature synthesis, manuscript diagnosis, theoretical framing, systematic-review support, and bibliometric-analysis support for academic work.

interface.longDescription: Academic writing, literature synthesis, manuscript diagnosis, theoretical framing, systematic-review support, and bibliometric-analysis support packaged for Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Review this manuscript for Q1 readiness.
Write an introduction for my paper.
Design an SLR protocol for this topic.
